title: lactuca canadensis f. steelei
intro: Lactuca canadensis f. steelei, also known as Prairie Lettuce or Prairie Wild Lettuce, is a subspecies of the Lactuca canadensis plant, which is a perennial herb native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lactuca canadensis f. steelei include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and flowers to create teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
